**We Baby Bears S02E27 - Independent Study: Mass Appeal**

_The bears are faced with the most important art critique of their young careers! In preparation of the big critique, Panda, along with his new friend Nori, rely on internet comments to make their work as likable as possible. But is art all about approval? Or is it about expressing who you are!?_
